title: Smoke-Fried Fodmap Puff Pastry Pie
description: A nutritious and comforting dish with a nutty, silky texture suitable for those on special diets, especially after illness or during Ukrainian festivities.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon to coat vegetables before frying

instructions: Gently warm the olive oil in a pan. Crush puff pastry sheets and lightly dust with all-purpose flour, then add them into the heated oil until golden brown on both sides.
Season the smoke flavoring evenly over each puff pastry piece. Keep them aside while preparing vegetables.
Clean, thinly slice veggies and coat in the softened butter before frying at 180°C (350°F) for about 2-3 minutes per side or until golden brown and soft.
Combine seasoned vegetables with smoke-flavored puff pastries on a plate. Serve hot as a healthy yet satisfying dessert option.
